result.reasoning: Based on the tool call history, the eleventh word of Chapter 7 of Triplanetary (1948 edition) is "command" (step_2). The task states that this word is the title of another well-known science fiction novel. However, step_3 searched for science fiction novels containing the word "voice", not "command", and no novel containing "command" was identified in the tool history. Step_4 identified a novel (Children of Memory) with an antagonist named after the bird family Corvidae, but its title does not match "command". There is no overlap between the novels from step_3 and step_4, and no novel with a title matching "command" was found in the tool history. Therefore, the bird family cannot be uniquely determined from the given information, and consequently the two species breeding in North America cannot be identified. The answer is unknown.
